[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101110 4
1 0110001 3
2 1000001 2
3 0111101 5
4 1001100 3
5 0110011 4
6 0010011 3
7 0110111 5

12 21 0001100 2
23 32 0101010 3
34 43 0001000 1
45 54 0000000 a
56 65 0010011 3 match 6
67 76 0110111 5 match 7
70 07 0001010 2

13 31 1001001 3
24 42 0001100 2
35 53 0010011 3 match 6

72 27 0101110 4 match 0

04 40 0001000 1

37 73 0111011 5
